forward.note: Single-broker IPO-education model (not consensus); steep OpenAI-driven ramp.

trail.val: UBS: profitability in 2H27, FCF-positive 2028; long-term low-60s GM / low-40s op margin

forward.note: Not operationally profitable today (2025 net income flattered by non-cash forward-contract gain).

trail.val: OpenAI ~750MW take-or-pay, three ~$8B tranches, ~$25B total; UBS models cloud → 85–90% of rev and OpenAI → 70–80% of rev by 2028

forward.note: The swing factor — also the concentration risk that replaces UAE concentration.

trail.val: AWS signed to deploy CS-3/WSE-3 in its cloud
UBS/Arcuri: "supply not demand" — TSMC wafer request finalized Feb accounting only for OpenAI; meaningful AWS capacity unlikely before 2027 (UBS models AWS only from 2028)

forward.note: Concentration-diluting datapoint but supply-gated; timing contested vs the deal signing.

trail.val: CS-4 (better platform/power) ramps early 2027; CS-5 (new core, more SRAM, still N5) 2028; first N3 part CS-6 late-2028/2029

forward.note: No near-term N3 contention with NVIDIA; CS-5 SRAM lift addresses the model-size knock.

trail.val: BofA (Vivek Arya): fast-inference ~10–20% incremental to the market (~$100bn if AI is trillion-plus)
MS init Overweight: high-speed-token prices up ~10x; "really opens up the opportunity"; Cerebras "in pole position"; Kimmy trillion-param rebuttal

forward.note: MS Overweight initiation ahead of first print is the most recent dated forward view.
